message:
Add 19 new beads: PIE (alien-artifact intelligence) + Fork Hardening epics

NEW EPIC: Principled Intelligence Engine (wa-1qz1, 10 children)
- Survival/hazard model for proactive mux server failure prediction
- BOCPD agent state transition detector (catches what regex can't)
- VOI-optimal capture scheduler (replaces heuristic polling)
- Conformal prediction for resource forecasting (formal bounds)
- Bayesian evidence ledger for pane classification (explainable AI)
- Continuous backpressure severity function (smooth throttling)
- Adaptive watchdog thresholds via Kalman filter
- ADWIN pattern drift detection
- Agent session behavioral DNA (fingerprinting + predictions)
- PIE test suite (100+ tests)

NEW EPIC: Fork Hardening (wa-3kxe, 6 children)
- Memory leak root cause analysis (ESO methodology)
- cgroups v2 memory budget + OOM prevention
- Differential snapshots for continuous saving
- Lock-free SPSC ring buffer for capture pipeline
- Operational telemetry pipeline (tracing + histograms)
- Fork Hardening benchmark suite

Under wa-rsaf:
- Formal session restoration verification via proptest

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
